typecheck.details: mypy not installed in ashare venv. Not a project requirement.

lint.details: 139 errors found, all pre-existing (unused imports, unused variables). No new lint errors introduced by historical-backfill milestone. Same count before and after milestone.

nonBlockingIssues.description: Empty TuShare responses for delisted/suspended stocks count as failures, causing DataUpdateLog to show FAILED status even for expected empty responses. Should use threshold-based status or separate skip category.
Per-stock SessionLocal() creation (800+ session open/close cycles). Consider batching for better performance.
should_skip_index() doesn't accept session parameter, always queries production DB during tests. Tests work around with mocking.
test_max_2_gaps_per_index is a placeholder test (only asserts len(dates) > 0). Real gap validation deferred to verify_backfill.py.
Concept backfill resume logic incorrectly skips concepts that already have recent daily update data but lack historical backfill data (checks max_date >= start_date).
Direct client.pro.ths_daily() call bypasses TushareClient's _request_with_retry and RateLimiter. TushareClient lacks a fetch_ths_daily() wrapper.
Industry backfill maps net_buy_amount from 'buy_elg_amount' while daily update script maps from 'net_buy_amount'. Potential data inconsistency between backfill and live update data.
Both concept and industry backfill scripts use print() instead of project's structured logging (get_logger). No DataUpdateLog tracking. No unit tests added.
log_to_database() writes status as uppercase 'COMPLETED'/'FAILED' but DataUpdateStatus enum uses lowercase 'completed'/'failed'. Creates inconsistent data_update_log entries.
OHLCV NULL check omits volume (the V in OHLCV). Volume column has NOT NULL constraint so not a functional bug, but incomplete verification.

appliedUpdates.description: Updated environment.md with current data universe stats: ~1000 stocks, 8 indices (including CSI 300/500/1000), 5-year data range from 2021-01-04, concept/industry historical coverage. Noted 北证50 exception (established late 2022).
Updated architecture.md to document the emergent backfill script convention (class-based *Backfiller pattern with --dry-run, --limit, DataUpdateLog tracking, progress logging).

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Clarify that 'Use TushareClient for all TuShare API calls' means all API methods should go through wrapper methods with _request_with_retry. When a wrapper doesn't exist (e.g., fetch_ths_daily()), workers should add one rather than calling client.pro directly.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: backfill-concept-industry used client.pro.ths_daily() directly because TushareClient lacks a fetch_ths_daily() wrapper, bypassing rate limiting and retry logic.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add note that 北证50 (899050.BJ) was established in late 2022, so it cannot meet 5-year data requirements. Validators should expect ~789 rows / data from 2022-12-19 for this index.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: backfill-index-daily handoff confirms 899050.BJ has 789 rows from 2022-12-19 vs the 1,100+ requirement for other indices. This is a known exception that should be documented to avoid validator confusion.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Explicitly state that scripts/ CLI tools must also use DataUpdateLog for tracking and structured logging (get_logger) rather than print(). The current wording 'Use existing DataUpdateLog model to track operations' is ambiguous about its scope.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: backfill-concept-industry used print() and skipped DataUpdateLog, while backfill-stock-daily and backfill-index-daily properly used both. Inconsistent application of the convention across workers in the same milestone.

rejectedObservations.observation: backend-worker skill references quant-dashboard paths for manual verification (port 8020, app.main:app)
rejectedObservations.reason: This is a skill-level concern about the backend-worker skill having quant-dashboard-specific instructions. However, the skill is shared across projects and workers correctly adapted. Not worth changing the skill for this project-specific quirk.

rejectedObservations.observation: services.yaml was temporarily modified by a worker (removed -j4) but was reverted before commit
rejectedObservations.reason: No action needed — worker caught and reverted the change. Self-correcting behavior.
